evals.prompt: Format this text into a professional email: Hey bob, wanted to check in about the Q4 numbers. they look off to me.
expectations: The output is properly formatted with paragraphs

evals.prompt: Take this messy list and make it a clean bulleted list: apples oranges bananas grapes (maybe) pears
evals.expected_output: A clean bulleted list of fruits
expectations: The output uses bullet points or dashes for each item
All five fruits are included in the list
The parenthetical note about grapes is handled appropriately
